sections.paragraph: pr.n. (if referred to the Hebrew language, i.q. “the mouth of caverns,” but it is doubtless to be regarded as Egyptian, namely ⲡⲝⲁⲭⲝ-ⲣⲱϯ a place adorned with green grass), [Pi-hahiroth], a town on the northern end of the Heroöpolitan gulf, situated to the east of the city Baal-Zephon, Exo 14:2, Exo 14:9 Num 33:7 without פִּי ibid. verse 8.
